title: Support assigning unpacked arrays to queues (#5924)
body:
This PR will eventually contain changes to enable casting VlUnpacked to VlQueue when passing in an unpacked array into a function call defined with a dynamic array as an argument, resolving #5924. Currently, it only contains the base self-checking tests as I don't have much time this week to dig into actually implementing the feature.

One question I did have though @wsnyder, was you mentioned testing both dynamic arrays and queues. Did you mean how it is currently implemented in my test case or did you mean having two different functions that each uses an array or queue as their argument a la:
```
static function automatic void check_array (int n, logic [WIDTH-1:0] array []);      
        for (int r=0; r<n; r++) begin
            `checkh(array[r], WIDTH'(r))
        end
    endfunction

static function automatic void check_queue (int n, logic [WIDTH-1:0] queue [$]);      
        for (int r=0; r<n; r++) begin
            `checkh(queue[r], WIDTH'(r))
        end
    endfunction
```
